name: FIRST INDUSTRIAL REALTY TRUST INC
business: First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. is a self-administered and fully integrated real estate company which owns, manages, acquires, sells, develops and redevelops industrial real estate. As of December 31, 2025, our in-service portfolio consisted of 414 industrial properties, located in 19 states, containing an aggregate of approximately 69.9 million square feet of gross leasable area.

exposures.sentence: Our investment focus is on 15 key logistics markets which exhibit desirable long-term growth characteristics and where developable land is relatively scarce.
International trade disputes, including U.S. trade tariffs and retaliatory tariffs, could adversely impact our business.

catalysts.event: Vertical construction commenced on two development projects
catalysts.sentence: This total includes two projects for which vertical construction commenced in the first quarter of 2026.
